name: SCC_CreateCM_Validate_Cnf
title: SCC_CreateCM_Validate_Cnf
syntax: void SCC_CreateCM_Validate_Cnf ( byte SourceMac[], byte TargetMac[], dword Result, dword ToggleNum )
description: Creates a CM_Validate.Cnf message for sending.

parameters.name: SourceMac
parameters.description: Source address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: TargetMac
parameters.description: Destination address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: Result
parameters.description: Result code: 0x00 = Not Ready 0x01 = Ready 0x02 = Success 0x03 = Failure 0x04 = Not Required 0x05-0xFF = Reserved

parameters.name: ToggleNum
parameters.description: Number of BC-edges detected by the EVSE.
SignalType dword 0x00 = PEV S2 toggles on CPLT line 0x01-0xFF = Reserved

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
